description: Proxy get/set/has traps (minimal slice): new Proxy(target,handler) intercepts property read/write and the in operator via handler.get/set/has; forwards to target when a trap is absent; typeof proxy is object. Gated on a distinct type byte so normal-object access is byte-unchanged (gen1==gen2==gen3).
